betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cadmium§f is used to make §bCadmium Steel§f, a substitute for §bTechnetium Steel§f.

§eObtaining:§f
1. Find §bMustard Willow§f plants (grow near §bBedrock Oil Deposits§f)
2. Acidize §bMustard Willow leaves§f with §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f
3. Smelt resulting cadmium powder into ingots

§eUses:§f
• §bCadmium Steel§f alloy - alternative to Technetium Steel
• Works in recipes requiring Tc Steel when you lack Technetium-99

§eTip:§f Look for Mustard Willow near bedrock oil when exploring for deposits.
